expectedIssues: Sports icon is missing the the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: The 'SCROLL DOWN' sticky/floating button overlaps the legal disclaimer fine print text at the bottom of the page, making a significant portion of the mandatory terms and conditions unreadable.

The legal disclaimer fine print text is extremely small (appears to be around 8-9px) and rendered in low contrast against the white background, making it nearly impossible to read even without the overlay obstruction.

The two bottom promotional panels (100% Poker Bonus Match and Second Chance Bonus Bet) appear to be cut off at the bottom of the viewport, with no clear visual indicator that there is more content below beyond the 'SCROLL DOWN' prompt.

expected.reasoning: No reported issue describes a missing sports icon in the bottom navigation bar; all reported issues concern overlapping elements, text readability, and cut-off content.
